program.title: Ntsiniz Singing Transformation Journey
program.description: Full production curriculum from absolute beginner to professional refinement, with adaptive routing, fair scoring, and app-ready content packs.
program.north_star: from wooden mic to expressive performer

levels.name: wooden_mic
levels.description: Cannot reliably match or hold a note

levels.name: beginner
levels.description: Can imitate some notes with low consistency

levels.name: developing
levels.description: Can match notes and simple patterns with support

levels.name: intermediate
levels.description: Can sing simple melodies with control

levels.name: advanced
levels.description: Can shape tone, phrasing, and dynamics intentionally

levels.name: pro_refinement
levels.description: Performance-ready singer seeking consistency and polish

drill_type_taxonomy.name: sustain_hold
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Hold one pitch steadily for a target duration

drill_type_taxonomy.name: pitch_slide
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Glide into or across pitches intentionally

drill_type_taxonomy.name: interval_jump
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Move accurately between two or more target notes

drill_type_taxonomy.name: phrase_sing
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Sing a phrase with legato and breath planning

drill_type_taxonomy.name: dynamic_control
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Control volume shape while maintaining pitch

drill_type_taxonomy.name: vowel_shape
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Maintain target vowel and resonance qualities

drill_type_taxonomy.name: vibrato_control
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Control straight tone and deliberate vibrato release

drill_type_taxonomy.name: performance_run
drill_type_taxonomy.description: Sing a longer line or excerpt with consistency

route_taxonomy.name: absolute_beginner
route_taxonomy.description: Starts at pitch awareness and first wins

route_taxonomy.name: weak_pitch
route_taxonomy.description: For learners who sing often but struggle with accuracy

route_taxonomy.name: confidence_builder
route_taxonomy.description: For shy learners who need safe repetition and reduced pressure

route_taxonomy.name: advanced_fast_track
route_taxonomy.description: Compressed route for already capable singers

routes.title: Absolute Beginner Route
routes.description: Starts with note awareness, imitation, and gentle stability.

routes.title: Weak Pitch Route
routes.description: Extra repetition on entry, slide, and interval control.

routes.title: Confidence Builder Route
routes.description: Reduces pressure, uses shorter takes, and gradually adds performance exposure.

routes.title: General Progression Route
routes.description: Balanced route through all fundamentals and artistic skills.

routes.title: Advanced Fast Track Route
routes.description: Compressed curriculum for advanced learners needing fewer basics and more refinement.

stages.title: Foundation
goals: hear and match a reference note
develop safe onset and breath basics
entry_criteria: new user OR route in R1/R3

stages.title: Control
stages.learner_profile: learner can find pitch but struggles to stay controlled

stages.title: Tone and Style
stages.learner_profile: learner sings in tune but needs better sound and flexibility

stages.title: Musicality
stages.learner_profile: learner needs phrasing, meaning, and interpretive control
goals: deliver contour and phrase breath intentionally

stages.title: Performance
stages.learner_profile: learner aims for repeatable, expressive, pressure-ready singing

lessons.title: First Reference Notes
lessons.purpose: Develop pitch awareness and first imitation

lessons.title: Gentle Matching
lessons.purpose: Match nearby notes with slow entry

lessons.title: Short Sustain
lessons.purpose: Hold short notes steadily

lessons.title: Breath and Clean Onset
lessons.purpose: Coordinate breath and clean tone starts

lessons.title: No-Pressure Repeats
lessons.purpose: Reduce fear using short forgiving reps

lessons.title: Two-Note Patterns
lessons.purpose: Move between simple patterns

lessons.title: Stable Entry
lessons.purpose: Enter the note accurately and settle faster

lessons.title: Longer Sustain
lessons.purpose: Increase hold duration and reduce drift

lessons.title: Slide Control
lessons.purpose: Use smooth intentional glides

lessons.title: Interval Basics
lessons.purpose: Accurately sing short jumps

lessons.title: Melody Basics
lessons.purpose: Echo short melodic patterns

lessons.title: Timing Anchor
lessons.purpose: Start at the right moment and keep shape

lessons.title: Vowel Focus
lessons.purpose: Keep vowels consistent through notes

lessons.title: Resonance Placement
lessons.purpose: Develop freer brighter resonance

lessons.title: Dynamic Shapes
lessons.purpose: Control soft, medium, and growing lines

lessons.title: Legato Lines
lessons.purpose: Connect notes smoothly

lessons.title: Register Bridge Intro
lessons.purpose: Smooth early register transitions

lessons.title: Tone Flex
lessons.purpose: Switch between lighter and fuller tone cleanly

lessons.title: Phrase Architecture
lessons.purpose: Plan breath and shape phrase arcs

lessons.title: Lyric Intent
lessons.purpose: Use text stress and intention

lessons.title: Melody Expression
lessons.purpose: Add dynamic and tonal contrast to melody

lessons.title: Rhythm Story
lessons.purpose: Use timing placement expressively

lessons.title: Interpretation
lessons.purpose: Try two emotional reads of the same line

lessons.title: Consistency Under Repeat
lessons.purpose: Keep musical choices repeatable

lessons.title: Performance Block 1
lessons.purpose: Short performance runs with technical targets

lessons.title: Performance Block 2
lessons.purpose: Longer excerpts with phrase and dynamic control

lessons.title: Recording Readiness
lessons.purpose: Deliver repeatable takes for playback review

lessons.title: Register and Style
lessons.purpose: Blend style choices with smooth transitions

lessons.title: Pro Polish
lessons.purpose: Refine onset, vowel, and line precision

lessons.title: Final Showcase
lessons.purpose: Complete performance-ready benchmark runs

drills.title: Reference Match 1
drills.instructions: Listen to the reference, then sing the same pitch and settle in the center. Use the reference replay if needed.

drills.title: Center the Pitch 1
drills.instructions: Listen to the reference, then sing the same pitch and settle in the center. Use the reference replay if needed.

drills.title: Safe Short Run 1
drills.instructions: Complete the short rep from start to finish without stopping yourself. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: finish the rep even if imperfect
treat this as a safe practice try
expected_mistakes: singing too quietly to be detected
correction_cues: commit to the full short rep
treat it as practice not performance

drills.title: Settle on the Note 1
drills.instructions: Listen to the reference, then sing the same pitch and settle in the center. Use the reference replay if needed.

drills.title: Support the Note 1
drills.instructions: Sing the target note and keep it steady for the full hold. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: keep the sound calm and centered
correction_cues: aim for a smaller steadier sound
drills.pass_criteria: score >= threshold AND held_duration_ms >= target_hold_ms * 0.8; target_hold_ms = 2200

drills.title: Commit and Complete 1
drills.instructions: Complete the short rep from start to finish without stopping yourself. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: finish the rep even if imperfect
treat this as a safe practice try
expected_mistakes: singing too quietly to be detected
correction_cues: commit to the full short rep
treat it as practice not performance

drills.title: Center the Pitch 2
drills.instructions: Listen to the reference, then sing the same pitch and settle in the center. Use the reference replay if needed.

drills.title: Upward Slide 2
drills.instructions: Start below or above the target as prompted, then slide smoothly into tune. Use the reference replay if needed.
safety_notes: keep slides in a comfortable range
avoid pushing volume at the top of the slide

drills.title: Settle on the Note 2
drills.instructions: Listen to the reference, then sing the same pitch and settle in the center. Use the reference replay if needed.

drills.title: Support the Note 2
drills.instructions: Sing the target note and keep it steady for the full hold. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: keep the sound calm and centered
correction_cues: aim for a smaller steadier sound
drills.pass_criteria: score >= threshold AND held_duration_ms >= target_hold_ms * 0.8; target_hold_ms = 1800

drills.title: Commit and Complete 2
drills.instructions: Complete the short rep from start to finish without stopping yourself. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: finish the rep even if imperfect
treat this as a safe practice try
expected_mistakes: singing too quietly to be detected
correction_cues: commit to the full short rep
treat it as practice not performance

drills.title: Step the Interval 2
drills.instructions: Hear both notes, then sing the jump cleanly without sliding unless told. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: hear both notes in your head
correction_cues: keep the jump light not forced
safety_notes: reduce range if the leap feels strained

correction_cues: aim for a smaller steadier sound

drills.pass_criteria: score >= threshold AND held_duration_ms >= target_hold_ms * 0.8; target_hold_ms = 2000

drills.title: Shape and Ring 4
drills.instructions: Keep the target vowel consistent as you sing the pattern. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: let resonance move, not the vowel
expected_mistakes: tone going dull on higher note
correction_cues: let resonance adjust not the vowel identity
use a mirror cue if needed

drills.title: Low-Pressure Rep 4
drills.instructions: Complete the short rep from start to finish without stopping yourself. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: finish the rep even if imperfect
treat this as a safe practice try
expected_mistakes: singing too quietly to be detected
correction_cues: commit to the full short rep
treat it as practice not performance

drills.title: Line in One Breath 4
drills.instructions: Sing the full phrase in one connected musical line with the planned breath. Use the reference replay if needed.
coach_cues: know where the line is going
save enough air for the ending
correction_cues: aim the phrase toward one destination note
safety_notes: reset if you run out of air instead of pushing

safety_notes: stay in speech-like volume on first tries

safety_notes: reduce range if the leap feels strained

correction_cues: keep airflow even across the bridge
allow a narrower vowel if needed
safety_notes: stay away from extreme high notes

drills.title: Commit and Complete 2
drills.instructions: Complete the short rep from start to finish without stopping yourself. Aim for a musical, not mechanical, result.
coach_cues: finish the rep even if imperfect
treat this as a safe practice try
expected_mistakes: singing too quietly to be detected
correction_cues: commit to the full short rep
treat it as practice not performance

drills.title: Soft to Strong 2
drills.instructions: Follow the on-screen volume curve while keeping pitch stable. Aim for a musical, not mechanical, result.
correction_cues: grow through breath not throat force
think smooth arc not sudden jump
safety_notes: back off if throat pressure rises

drills.title: Grow then Release 3
drills.instructions: Follow the on-screen volume curve while keeping pitch stable. Aim for a musical, not mechanical, result.
correction_cues: grow through breath not throat force

drills.title: Controlled Crescendo 3

correction_cues: grow through breath not throat force
think smooth arc not sudden jump
safety_notes: back off if throat pressure rises

drills.title: Support the Note 3
drills.instructions: Sing the target note and keep it steady for the full hold. Aim for a musical, not mechanical, result.
coach_cues: keep the sound calm and centered
correction_cues: aim for a smaller steadier sound
drills.pass_criteria: score >= threshold AND held_duration_ms >= target_hold_ms * 0.8; target_hold_ms = 4000

drills.title: Phrase Arc 3
drills.instructions: Sing the full phrase in one connected musical line with the planned breath. Aim for a musical, not mechanical, result.
coach_cues: know where the line is going
save enough air for the ending
correction_cues: aim the phrase toward one destination note
safety_notes: reset if you run out of air instead of pushing

lesson_completion_logic: lesson is complete when average of completed drills >= stage threshold
at least 2 drills in lesson must individually pass
if a performance_run drill is present, it must be attempted at least once
unlock_logic: next lesson unlocks after current lesson complete
advanced fast-track can skip one lesson per stage if benchmark score >= 88 and no weak-profile flags
confidence route may insert optional confidence boosters without blocking progression
mastery_logic: drill mastered after 3 consecutive passes OR 4 passes out of last 5 attempts
strong mastery if average score across last 3 passes >= threshold + 8
regression flag if last 5 attempts drop by 10+ points from established mastery
fairness_guards: do not score unvoiced frames, reference playback frames, or recovery-state frames
use best valid window for beginner sustain and match drills
cap penalties from low-confidence input before labeling a learner incapable
never show an interstitial or paywall during active audio states

diagnosis_profiles.coach_tip_template: You are usually landing low. Start a tiny bit higher, then settle gently.
You often land high. Begin slightly lower and let the note center before holding.
You are arriving too aggressively. Slide in more slowly and stop earlier.
Your pitch falls as you hold. Use steadier airflow and a slightly brighter target.
Your tone is wobbling. Make the sound smaller and more centered.
The engine is not hearing enough clear voice. Use a speaking-level tone and stay closer to the mic.
Focus on whether the pattern goes up or down before worrying about exact notes.
Finish the rep even if imperfect. Completion builds confidence faster than restarting.

help_mode_trigger_rules: activate help mode after 3 fails on same drill in 24h
activate help mode if rolling 5-attempt average < 55
activate help mode if low_voiced_ratio occurs twice in a row

help_mode_adjustments.improvement_floor_rule: if score improves by >= 15 percent from previous attempt, final_score = max(final_score, previous_score + 5), cap 74

plan: Day 5: review weakest diagnosis tag + one milestone attempt
Day 5: stage benchmark or replay of hardest failed drill
Day 4: one optional performance_run with low-pressure language
Day 5: self-selected weak area plus final run

milestone_checkpoints.name: First stable note
milestone_checkpoints.criteria: pass any sustain_hold drill in S1

milestone_checkpoints.name: First accurate interval
milestone_checkpoints.criteria: pass any interval_jump drill in S2

milestone_checkpoints.name: Tone shaper
milestone_checkpoints.criteria: pass 2 vowel_shape or dynamic_control drills in S3

milestone_checkpoints.name: Story teller
milestone_checkpoints.criteria: pass any phrase_sing and any interpretation drill in S4

skip_rules: may skip first lesson of S2, S3, or S4 if stage benchmark >= 88
cannot skip safety-critical lessons involving onset, breath, or register_bridge if diagnosis tag unstable or low_voiced_ratio is active
must still complete at least one performance_run and one phrase_sing in every stage from S3 onward
fast_track_review_rules: if skipped lesson leads to regression flag in next 5 attempts, reinstate skipped lesson as remediation
advanced route still uses help_mode if confidence or signal issues arise
